onboarding.welcome.title:
Let's begin
your bond.
onboarding.welcome.body: Every bond is unique. Take a moment to tell us about the one who matters most.
onboarding.step1.title:
What kind of
companion?
onboarding.step2.title:
Tell us more
about them.
onboarding.step3.title: Their photo.
onboarding.step3.body: A photo makes everything more real.
onboarding.step4.title:
What do you
call them?
onboarding.step6.body: Not facts. Just how you feel about them.
onboarding.finish.badge: Love starts at 0. Let's grow it.
onboarding.finish.title:
This is where
your bond begins.
onboarding.desc.placeholder2: Gets excited when I come home
onboarding.desc.placeholder3: Knows exactly when I need comfort
home.presence.label: Presence Progress
home.summary.zero: Every day you show up for {{name}} is a day that matters.
home.summary.one: Today, your love grew through one quiet moment with {{name}}. These things add up.
home.summary.few: Today, your love grew through {{count}} moments, including {{phrase}}. {{name}} felt every one.
home.summary.many: Today was full of love — {{count}} moments with {{name}}, built from {{phrase}} and more. Days like this are rare.
home.summary.all: Today, you gave everything. {{count}} moments of care for {{name}}. That kind of devotion leaves a mark.
care.header.title: Every moment matters.
care.header.body: Care transforms into love over time.
care.empty.title: No care moments yet.
care.empty.body: Every action you take becomes love.
presence.whisper.relationship: It grows with every moment shared.
presence.whisper.presence: Love finds a way to remain.
presence.body.care: Every time you reach out, something small takes shape in the space between you. You may not see it yet.
presence.body.relationship: The pattern of your attention has become its own kind of language. What you have built together is real.
presence.body.presence: What you have given has become something that no longer needs you to hold it. It continues on its own.
presence.mostGiven.sentence: {{action}} with {{name}} — recorded {{count}} times. That repetition is its own kind of love.
presence.mostGiven.body_post: . That repetition is its own kind of love.
presence.collar.title: BONDA Collar
presence.meet.heading: Beyond the connection
presence.meet.phone.label: Meet online
presence.meet.phone.sub: A call. A voice. Something real.
presence.meet.touch.label: Touch gently
presence.meet.speak.label: Call softly
presence.meet.ar.label: Meet in AR
presence.meet.vr.label: Meet in VR
presence.meet.person.label: Meet in person
memories.title: Pages of your bond
memories.body: Every moment of care becomes a page. Written memories become chapters.
memories.empty.title: No pages yet.
memories.empty.body: Every care action creates a memory. They will all live here.
memories.prompts.heading: Write into the bond
memories.prompts.body: These questions have no right answers. Take your time.
memories.prompt.being: What kind of being were they?
memories.prompt.name: What did they call you?
memories.prompt.most_love: When did you feel the most love?
memories.prompt.unforgettable: What memory can you not forget?
memories.prompt.tell_them: What do you want to tell them?
memories.section.empty_written: Nothing written yet. These prompts will wait for you.
memories.section.empty_care: Care actions will become memories here.
dailycard.sub: A visual shaped by the care and memories you gave today.
memories.photo.heading: Add a photo memory
presence.chat.footer: Responses are grounded in your memories. LLM is mocked for this demo.
profile.care.title: Care Breakdown
profile.lang.label: Language
profile.photo.title: Choose Photo
collar.empty: The collar is listening. Moments with {{name}} will appear here as they happen.
collar.soon.label: BONDA Collar (Coming Soon)
collar.soon.body: Auto recording will be available with BONDA Collar.
wallet.title: Bond Wallet
wallet.totalLove.body: Every moment of care you give is recorded here.
wallet.verified.explainer: Verified love reflects the quality and depth of your care — not just the quantity.
wallet.bond.title: BOND
wallet.tokenUse.family.desc: For those who care for others
wallet.convert.notYet.zero: Keep caring for {{name}}. As your love deepens, it becomes something more.
wallet.convert.notYet.progress: {{n}} more verified love points until your next BOND.
wallet.convert.confirmed: Your love has been recognized. {{n}} BOND received.
wallet.sheet.title: Convert your bond into support.
wallet.sheet.body: {{amount}} verified love points become {{tokens}} BOND — a token that lets your care reach further. It can support {{name}}'s care, help families, or go toward those who need it most.
wallet.sheet.footer: This is not a transaction. This is your relationship with {{name}}, made tangible.
coin.subtitle: Generated from your relationship.
coin.label.name: Coin Name
coin.minted.headline: Your relationship is now verified.
coin.value.heading: Where your bond continues
coin.value.body:
Your bond is not just remembered.
It continues to create value.
coin.value.donation.label: Support other lives
coin.value.donation.body: A portion of your bond's value can support animals in need — shelters, rescue, and welfare causes.
coin.value.utility.label: Use in real-world services
coin.value.utility.body: Your bond can be recognized by partner services — veterinary care, nutrition, and pet wellbeing.
coin.value.convert.label: Convert a portion into value
coin.value.convert.body: A small portion of your relationship's depth can be acknowledged. Not as a trade — as recognition.
coin.value.convert.limit: Partial only. This is not an exchange.
coin.value.notice: This is not a financial product. Your bond's value is relational — what you see here is its continuation.
photo.picker.heading: Choose the photo that feels most like them.
photo.picker.upload.sub: JPG, PNG or HEIC from your device
